questions.question: In a sub-game perfect equilibrium, what is the best response of a player to a given Nash equilibrium of the super-game?
options: A) The same strategy
B) A mixed strategy
C) A random strategy
D) Any other strategy
questions.explanation: The best response of a player to a given Nash equilibrium of the super-game is the same strategy.

questions.question: What is the main characteristic of a sub-game perfect equilibrium?
options: A) The equilibrium is stable against any deviation
B) The equilibrium is not necessarily stable against any deviation
C) The equilibrium is not unique
D) The equilibrium is only optimal in the sub-game
questions.explanation: The main characteristic of a sub-game perfect equilibrium is that it is stable against any deviation. A player cannot improve their payoff by unilaterally deviating from the equilibrium strategy.

questions.question: In a sub-game perfect equilibrium, what is guaranteed?
options: A) The equilibrium is optimal for all players
B) The equilibrium is stable against any deviation
C) The equilibrium is unique
D) The equilibrium is the Nash equilibrium of the super-game
questions.explanation: In a sub-game perfect equilibrium, the equilibrium is stable against any deviation. This means that no player can improve their payoff by unilaterally deviating from the equilibrium strategy.

questions.question: What is the relationship between a sub-game perfect equilibrium and the Nash equilibrium of the super-game?
options: A) A sub-game perfect equilibrium is the same as the Nash equilibrium of the super-game
B) A sub-game perfect equilibrium is a refinement of the Nash equilibrium of the super-game
C) A sub-game perfect equilibrium is a contradiction of the Nash equilibrium of the super-game
D) A sub-game perfect equilibrium is only related to the Nash equilibrium of the super-game in certain cases
questions.explanation: A sub-game perfect equilibrium is a refinement of the Nash equilibrium of the super-game. This means that a sub-game perfect equilibrium is a more precise and stable equilibrium.

questions.question: What is the purpose of a sub-game perfect equilibrium?
options: A) To find the optimal solution for the super-game
B) To find the stable equilibrium of the super-game
C) To find the refinement of the Nash equilibrium of the super-game
D) To find the optimal solution for the sub-game
questions.explanation: The purpose of a sub-game perfect equilibrium is to find the refinement of the Nash equilibrium of the super-game. This means that it helps to identify the stable and optimal equilibrium in the sub-game.
